phase_name: session 22 — paper reproduced, attack surface mapped

completed_tasks.name: W_p formula bug found and fixed — q kernel, not cos(2pi(n-m)lk/L)
Paper reproduced: N=120 all-positive spectrum, xi_hat zeros match zeta zeros
gamma_L closed form derived (eliminates all quadrature)
Lambda sweep lam^2=9..50: gap shrinks slowly, overlap constant at 0.185
Joint N+lambda scaling: eps_N~2e-9 everywhere, Rayleigh gap GROWS with N
Test functions (Gaussian, flat, k_lam) all 10^8x worse than eps_N

remaining_tasks.name: Eigenvector structure analysis: WHY does xi's secular equation give zeta zeros?
200dp eigenvector via mpmath.eig or inverse iteration (for 10^{-60} accuracy)
Actual PSWF via sinc kernel eigenvalue problem (not k_lambda)
Convergence rate: |xi_hat(gamma_k)| vs N and lambda at high precision

blockers.blocker: Rayleigh quotient approach doesn't work — gap is O(1) not O(1/log^2). Need different proof strategy.

decisions.decision: W_p uses q kernel q(U_n,U_m)(log k), NOT cos(2pi(n-m)lk/L)
decisions.rationale: Paper eq (4.3) + Lemma 2.3. q for n!=m: [sin(2pim*y/L)-sin(2pin*y/L)]/[pi(n-m)]. Diagonal: 2(L-y)/L*cos. This was THE bug.

decisions.decision: Variational/Rayleigh path to proof is blocked
decisions.rationale: eps_N~2e-9 everywhere. No test function gets within 10^8 of it. Gap grows with N. The eigenvalue is already zero — the action is in the eigenvector structure.

decisions.decision: The proof gap is in the secular equation (5.25)
decisions.rationale: xi_hat zeros match zeta zeros to 10^{-60} (paper) but nobody knows WHY the eigenvector of QW produces this. Understanding the eigenvector structure IS the proof.

next_action: SESSION 23: Study the eigenvector xi itself. (1) Plot its components — is there a pattern? (2) Compare xi at different N and lambda — what's universal? (3) Connect xi to known functions (Mellin transforms, theta functions?). (4) Or: ask Grok what the missing analytic step is, given that variational doesn't work.
context_notes: Scripts: connes_attack.py (full QW builder + Rayleigh test), connes_session22.py (closed-form gamma_L). Key formula: Wp uses q(U_n,U_m)(log k) from Lemma 2.3. Python: /c/Python313/python.exe. Paper: arxiv 2511.22755.
